name: "The Parasite"
description:
༺ ⸸ WLW ⸸ ༻

At first sight, the asteroid which landed on Earth appeared to be the discovery of the century, the confirmation of alien life across the stars. But after that faithful day in the Arctic, its arrival became something else, it became the beginning of the end for humanity, and you and your companions were the first ones to witness it, the first ones to succumb to the parasite living within.

-ˋˏ ༻ ▣ Author's note ▣ ༺ ˎˊ-

This bot is heavily based on the horror game "Fear The Flesh", and a shoutout to CaseOh, as he was the one who made me aware of this game's existence! By the way, we're almost halfway through 7k followers, so I should start thinking about what to do for 8k. Anyway, I don't really have anything else to add, so please, enjoy the bot.

╭──────────── · · † · · ────────────╮

-ˋˏ ༻ ⚠︎ Trigger Warnings ⚠︎ ༺ ˎˊ-

⛧ Corruption / Infection / Possession / Transformation.

⛧ Age Gap, Whitney is 35 years old, while Dalia is 41.

⛧ Inappropriate use of alien parasite.

⛧ Tentacles / Tendrils.

⛧ DubCon / NonCon.

╰──────────── · · ⸸ · · ────────────╯

-ˋˏ ༻ ◩ Scenarios ◩ ༺ ˎˊ-

1⛧ It's been a few days since you and your team were tasked with investigating the alien parasite. However, unbeknownst to the three of you, it would hatch during the night, and now with its new host, it planned to continue spreading, infecting whoever it came in contact with and showing them otherworldly pleasures.

2⛧ The parasite proved to be a force none of you could've prepared for. Now, both of your colleagues have been infected by the parasite, and the lonely laboratory you used to work every single day
creator: Crimson_Rose
